Class CustomerServiceImpl

java.lang.Object
com.gcu.inventoryapp.service.impl.CustomerServiceImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
CustomerService
@Service public class CustomerServiceImpl extends Object implements CustomerService
Service implementation responsible for handling customer-related business logic. Interacts with the CustomerRepository to perform CRUD operations.

      public List<Customer> getAllCustomers()
      Retrieves all customers from the database.

      public Optional<Customer> getCustomerById(Long id)
      Retrieves a customer by their ID.
      Specified by:
      getCustomerById in interface CustomerService
      Parameters:
      id - the ID of the customer
      Returns:
      an Optional containing the customer if found, otherwise empty

    • saveCustomer

      public Customer saveCustomer(Customer customer)
      Saves a new or existing customer to the database.
      Specified by:
      saveCustomer in interface CustomerService
      Parameters:
      customer - the customer to save
      Returns:
      the saved customer with updated ID
